name: Airtable
description: Spreadsheet-database with record CRUD, schema management, and comments via the Airtable MCP server

fields.label: Airtable Personal Access Token
fields.description: Personal access token from airtable.com/create/tokens. Scopes: schema.bases:read, data.records:read, and optionally schema.bases:write, data.records:write, data.recordComments:read/write.

baseId.description: Default Airtable base ID to scope operations
